title: GWI POS Run State
description: Tracks the current execution state of the baseline enforcement system. Written by the Stage 11 wrapper. Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/run-state.json. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","producer":"11-system-hardening.sh","generated_at":"2026-03-20T14:30:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","baseline_version":"baseline-2026.03.20.1","state":"running","last_run_at":"2026-03-20T14:30:00Z","last_outcome":"success","triggered_by":"installer","host_boot_id":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890","locked_by":"11-system-hardening.sh","lock_pid":12345}

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward compatibility. Consumers must tolerate unknown fields.

producer.description: Name of the script or service that wrote this file.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was last written.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier, read from SERVER_NODE_ID in /opt/gwi-pos/.env.

state.description: Current execution state. State machine: idle -> running -> success/success_with_warnings/failed_required -> idle/degraded. running -> pending_reboot -> (reboot) -> running_verify -> idle/degraded. 'blocked' indicates lock contention or prerequisite failure.

last_run_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent baseline run start.

last_outcome.description: Outcome of the most recent completed baseline run.

host_boot_id.description: Unique boot session ID from /proc/sys/kernel/random/boot_id. Changes on every reboot. Used to detect reboot completion.

locked_by.description: Name of the entrypoint that currently holds the execution lock. Null when idle.

lock_pid.description: PID of the process holding the execution lock. Null when idle. Used for stale lock detection (PID dead + age > 60min = stale).
